name: gws-toolkit
description: Google Workspace toolkit on the official gws CLI (drive/docs/sheets/gmail). ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only.

interface.shortDescription: Drive Google Workspace (Drive/Docs/Sheets/Slides/Gmail/Calendar) from the CLI
interface.longDescription: Operate Google Workspace through the official gws CLI without leaving the agent: list and upload Drive files, read and write Docs, append to Sheets, build SCQA/Minto-structured Slides decks (slides-builder + slides-design), triage and send Gmail, and manage Calendar agendas. Includes gws-setup for first-run auth and a using-gws-toolkit router across 18 skills.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my unread Gmail and draft replies.
Build a Slides deck from this outline.
Append these rows to my Google Sheet.
